prediction.reasoning: NEE (NextEra Energy) is a large-cap utility stock with historically low volatility. Based on typical utility stock behavior, I expect minimal price movement over 7 days. The point estimate assumes slight upward drift typical of dividend-paying utilities. Confidence intervals reflect the stock's historical volatility of approximately 15-20% annually, scaled to 7 days. Utilities tend to have smaller price swings compared to growth stocks, so the intervals are relatively narrow around the current price.
